verified_damage_language_summary: The declaration states that after rehabilitation was substantially complete, U.S. Park Police responded to an NPS damage report involving caulk over foam sealant cut with a sharp knife or razor, destruction of delaminating surface material, and about 70 fence post tops thrown into the pool.
